raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the frame","name":"Before we get into specifics, what would be most useful to talk through today?","description":"Gives James control over the agenda and establishes a low-pressure starting point.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Since the decision","name":"What has changed for you since the promotion decision?","description":"Surfaces the most salient shift in his day-to-day without forcing him to name the cause.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ritual participation","name":"What feels different about the team rituals lately?","description":"Invites a concrete comparison to his previous level of participation and what is driving the change.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"What landed","name":"What feedback do you think landed most clearly for you?","description":"Surfaces the specific message he heard rather than his general reaction to it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback gap","name":"What part of the feedback still feels unresolved to you?","description":"Finds the missing piece or ambiguity that may be shaping his next steps.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring intent","name":"What are you hoping the mentoring program builds for you?","description":"Tests whether mentoring is a growth lever, a side path, or something else entirely.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Time trade-off","name":"What has the mentoring program displaced in your week?","description":"Surfaces the opportunity cost and whether the program is crowding out core product leadership work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next path","name":"What concrete path forward do you see for yourself from here?","description":"Gets James to name the direction he believes is real rather than waiting for the manager to define it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First move","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to shift before we next meet?","description":"Ends the conversation on a specific commitment that can be followed up.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
